---
title: "Statista"
page-layout: article
---

# Statista

**Provider:** Statista

## Description

Statistics portal aggregating data, charts, infographics, dossiers, and reports from thousands of sources. Supports quick fact-finding, market research, and data visualization.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Government & International Statistics
- **Access model:** Open Access
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Government & International Statistics

## Links

- [Access resource](https://www.statista.com/login/campus/)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
